records.m_Talk_ENG: Come to think of it, what about Mavka and Sasha? Where are they?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Come to think of it, what about Mavka and Sasha? Where are they?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Come to think of it, what about Mavka and Sasha? Where are they?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It seems that... we're facing the worst possible situation.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It seems that... we're facing the worst possible situation.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It seems that... we're facing the worst possible situation.

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Mavka...!</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Mavka...!</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Mavka...!</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>But what's that weapon on her back?</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>But what's that weapon on her back?</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>But what's that weapon on her back?</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>What's going on? Is she...?!</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>What's going on? Is she...?!</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>What's going on? Is she...?!</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>It's no use. She can't hear you.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>It's no use. She can't hear you.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>It's no use. She can't hear you.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>The only thing you see in front... is our enemy. That's all.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>The only thing you see in front... is our enemy. That's all.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>The only thing you see in front... is our enemy. That's all.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mavka, can you hear me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mavka, can you hear me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mavka, can you hear me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you do, could you nod?
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you do, could you nod?
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you do, could you nod?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hehe, so you do hear me. Very good.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hehe, so you do hear me. Very good.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hehe, so you do hear me. Very good.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I asked the doctor so that you could only hear my voice. He's such a gentleman.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I asked the doctor so that you could only hear my voice. He's such a gentleman.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I asked the doctor so that you could only hear my voice. He's such a gentleman.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Do you see those people in front of you? How dare they aim their guns at you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Do you see those people in front of you? How dare they aim their guns at you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Do you see those people in front of you? How dare they aim their guns at you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: They are villains for sure. So let's kill them all, okay?
records.m_Talk_DEU: They are villains for sure. So let's kill them all, okay?
records.m_Talk_FRA: They are villains for sure. So let's kill them all, okay?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I think you might have some trouble on your own, so I'll send some friends your way.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I think you might have some trouble on your own, so I'll send some friends your way.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I think you might have some trouble on your own, so I'll send some friends your way.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Once you finish and come back, I'll make you some delicious food. So do your best, okay?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Once you finish and come back, I'll make you some delicious food. So do your best, okay?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Once you finish and come back, I'll make you some delicious food. So do your best, okay?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mavka! Answer me if you can hear me!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mavka! Answer me if you can hear me!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mavka! Answer me if you can hear me!

records.m_Talk_ENG: The C.O.s are protecting Mavka's side...
records.m_Talk_DEU: The C.O.s are protecting Mavka's side...
records.m_Talk_FRA: The C.O.s are protecting Mavka's side...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Never has my bad gut feeling been wrong.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Never has my bad gut feeling been wrong.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Never has my bad gut feeling been wrong.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What's the plan?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What's the plan?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What's the plan?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...We fight.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...We fight.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...We fight.

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ff3636>Mommy... save me...!</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ff3636>Mommy... save me...!</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ff3636>Mommy... save me...!</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: That voice...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: That voice...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: That voice...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I-it can't be...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I-it can't be...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I-it can't be...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ah... Ahhhh...!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ah... Ahhhh...!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ah... Ahhhh...!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Watch out!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Watch out!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Watch out!

records.m_Talk_ENG: W-what...?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: W-what...?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: W-what...?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mavka's stopping the C.O.s.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mavka's stopping the C.O.s.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mavka's stopping the C.O.s.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But her movement is strange. Is she being controlled by something?
records.m_Talk_DEU: But her movement is strange. Is she being controlled by something?
records.m_Talk_FRA: But her movement is strange. Is she being controlled by something?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I don't think she's being fully controlled.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I don't think she's being fully controlled.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I don't think she's being fully controlled.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mavka must be resisting.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mavka must be resisting.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mavka must be resisting.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But we can't guarantee for how long.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But we can't guarantee for how long.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But we can't guarantee for how long.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But when I am convinced that you are the enemy, I won't hesitate to kill you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But when I am convinced that you are the enemy, I won't hesitate to kill you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But when I am convinced that you are the enemy, I won't hesitate to kill you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mavka... hang in there...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mavka... hang in there...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mavka... hang in there...!
